  "findings": [
    "Stored P0420 with freeze frame at steady 45 mph cruise",
    "No upstream/downstream O2 sensor waveform data provided",
    "No fuel trim values attached",
    "No exhaust leak inspection results",
    "Catalytic converter replacement quoted without supporting diagnostics"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Perform exhaust leak inspection (manifold, gaskets, flex pipe, converter shell)",
    "Capture upstream and downstream O2 sensor waveforms at idle and cruise",
    "Record long-term and short-term fuel trims",
    "Check for post-catalyst O2 sensor signal activity indicating converter inefficiency",
    "Verify no other DTCs or pending codes that could affect catalyst monitoring"
  ],
  "rationale": "P0420 indicates catalyst system efficiency below threshold, but the code alone does not confirm a failed converter. Common causes include exhaust leaks, oxygen sensor faults, or fuel control issues. Without waveform data, fuel trims, or leak inspection, the quoted converter replacement is premature and may not resolve the root cause.",
  "references": [
    "OEM service information: P0420 diagnostic flow chart",
    "SAE J1979 (OBD-II) catalyst monitor enable criteria"
  ]
}
